title: Bindings, Scope, Closures, and Lifetime · Async Failure Triage
summary: Build configurable counters and validators without leaking mutable state across community-service widgets. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a closure-backed state and validation library and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose const, let, or legacy var from reassignment, scope, and initialization behavior.
Resolve names through lexical environments and identify shadowing without guessing from call order.
Predict declaration instantiation, function hoisting, and temporal dead-zone failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
